name: piramide-eventos
description: Landing page Espaço Pirâmide Eventos — versão dark (produção)

scripts.dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist --port 8788
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=piramide-eventos --branch=main
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=piramide-eventos
